attributes.description: Alerts when `zookeeper.ruok == 0`. Node failed its four-letter health check — not serving requests.
attributes.name: [ZooKeeper OTel] Node health check failed

investigation_guide.blob:
## ZooKeeper node health check failed

### What fired
`zookeeper.ruok == 0` during the window.

### Why it matters
`ruok` is ZooKeeper's built-in liveness signal. A failed ruok means the node is unable to respond — loss of ensemble member.

### Triage
1. Check process state and logs.

### Remediation
- Restart the node after root-causing.

### Tuning
- Always P1.
